series_metadata.series_description: File includes a copy of the final rule, transcripts of public hearings and other related public documents.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: In office until rule is rescinded, then destroy file. If more than two revisions occur to an active rule, destroy the public files prior to the last 2 revisions. ; Electronic: In office until rule is rescinded, then destroy file. If more than two revisions occur to an active rule, destroy the public files prior to the last 2 revisions., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Erase
